chapter_title.ar: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الِاثْنَيْ عَشَرَ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَيْهِمْ ( عليهم السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 126 – What has come regarding the twelve and the text upon them<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (231/ 6)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (231/ 6)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ نَحْنُ اثْنَا عَشَرَ إِمَاماً مِنْهُمْ حَسَنٌ وَ حُسَيْنٌ ثُمَّ الْأَئِمَّةُ مِنْ وُلْدِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Washha, from Aban, from Zurara who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘We<sup>asws</sup> are twelve Imams<sup>asws</sup>. From them<sup>asws</sup> are Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, and Husayn<sup>asws</sup>, then the Imams<sup>asws</sup> are from the sons<sup>asws</sup> of Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 16. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla ibn mmd from al-Washsha’ from Aban from Zurara who has said the following. “I heard abu Ja‘far (a.s.) say, ‘We are twelve Imams. Al-Hassan and al-Husayn are of them then are the Imams from the descendants of al-Husayn (a.s.).”
